title: January 26, 2015 – Leah Shenandoah
summary: On the show with us this week is Oneida Iroquois Wolf Clan member Leah Shenandoah. She won Debut Artist of the Year at the 2014 Native American Music Awards for her inventive new album Spektre . Leah is also a jeweler and multi-media artist.
